title: Embed Figma and Canva directly into your monday
excerpt: Embed Figma and Canva directly into your board view, item view, or dashboard view with the Multi Embed app. Display all your designs in one place, customize the size and position of your embedded tools for seamless acces…

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Embed Figma and Canva directly into your board view, item view, or dashboard view with the Multi Embed app. Display all your designs in one place, customize the size and position of your embedded tools for seamless access and real-time collaboration, and enhance productivity without switching apps.

Try it now with a 14-day free trial—Click here to install on your account

Group 12611582031920×1081 109 KB

posts.author: Peraj (Peraj)
posts.cookedHtml:
I used this to embed Figma, and it worked smoothly!
Can it also embed tools like Google Sheets and Forms?

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Peraj, Thanks.

Regarding your question, you can embed Google Sheets, Forms, and more. Check out the full list inside the app:

Screenshot 2024-10-06 at 13.11.152018×1184 162 KB

posts.author: Troikesse (ased)
posts.cookedHtml: Last month, I was working on a tight deadline and constantly switching tabs—total productivity killer. Something like this would’ve kept me focused and made collaboration way smoother. By the way, came across https://proworkflow4.net/ recently; it’s packed with helpful tools like this for creative pros.
